mapper.sql: id, base_currency, quote_currency, rate, source, source_as_of, fetched_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_rate (base_currency, quote_currency, rate, source, source_as_of, fetched_at) VALUES (#{baseCurrency}, #{quoteCurrency}, #{rate}, #{source}, #{sourceAsOf}, #{fetchedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), rate = VALUES(rate), source = VALUES(source), source_as_of = VALUES(source_as_of), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT FROM exchange_rate WHERE base_currency = #{baseCurrency} AND quote_currency = #{quoteCurrency}
